title: Dreamy SetLobby
description: This plugin add's 4 new commands /setlobby, /setspawn, /spawn, /lobby, It's just a simple plugin if you don't want anything fancy just functional!
body:
This is a simple plugin that add 4 new commands to your server!

/setlobby -> Only for op players
/setspawn -> Only for op players
/lobby -> Everyone can use
/spawn -> Everyone can use

the way that this plugin work's is very simple!, you go to your main spawn or lobby on your server and type "/setlobby" or "/setspawn" then your players can type "/spawn" or "/lobby" to go the place where you setted!

This plugin has an default config that the players have an 30 second cooldown before using "/spawn" or "/lobby" and an 5 sec cooldown before getting teleported!, if the players move they will cancel the teleport!
